name: Amicorp Ltd.
lede: Amicorp runs two centers across two Indian cities. Mumbai and Bengaluru, covering GCC/GIC, built over 21 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Amicorp office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Amicorp Ltd. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Amicorp runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Mumbai, Bengaluru), covering GCC/GIC. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership

titles.title: Managing Director and Head Globalization Services

about.description: Amicorp's India footprint covers Mumbai and Bengaluru, spanning GCC/GIC. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all seventeen decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Amicorp operate in India?
faq.a: Amicorp operates 2 active centers in India.

faq.a: Amicorp's India footprint includes Mumbai and 1 additional city.

faq.q: What types of centers does Amicorp run in India?
faq.a: Amicorp runs GCC/GIC centers in India.

faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Amicorp's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Amicorp's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.
